title: gymnocalycium × pazoutianum
intro: Gymnocalycium × pazoutianum, also known as the Pazout's ball cactus, is a hybrid cactus species resulting from the cross between Gymnocalycium stellatum and Gymnocalycium parviflorum. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Gymnocalycium × pazoutianum include potential relief from pain, fever reduction, and wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to create infusions, decoctions, and salves, which can be applied topically or consumed orally, although further research is necessary to confirm its efficacy.
